purpose: Option B P1 MINIMAL — lambda*I_irr regularizer PoC (cell-first pivot first step)

design.sign_convention: L_IX uses +lambda*I_irr (forward drift reward); loss uses -beta_i*lambda*I_irr so lower loss encourages forward drift
design.gradient_policy: MINIMAL: gradient remains pure dCE/dparams (I_irr term is a monitor + reported metric). HYBRID P2 will add dI_irr/dW backprop.

blocker_watch.i_irr_fixpoint_collapse: If training saturates within K steps, I_irr_step -> 0 and regularizer becomes inert. For 10-step smoke, expect drift throughout; fixpoint not yet reached.
blocker_watch.convergence_equivalence: Both baseline and MINIMAL should converge on CE since gradient is pure dCE/dparams.
